title: 解除发布前公开 tag 检查的循环依赖

sources.reason: Current required smoke gate that fails before a new public tag exists.
Exact-SHA publication workflow that creates the tag after merge.
Public release distribution checker and its current tag-precondition behavior.
Regression coverage for release distribution and tag validation.
Documented PR-first release sequence and public distribution contract.
Repository Work Item, verification, and no-bypass governance requirements.

riskAssessment.reason: The required smoke check currently demands a public tag before the PR that creates its release metadata can merge; the exception must remain narrow and preserve strict post-publication validation.

executionDecision.reason: The release-preparation exception, exact next-version rule, and post-publication verification are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Review that only an exact next patch release is allowed in preparation mode, normal public checks remain strict, and release publication dispatches a post-release smoke verification.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A release-preparation check accepts exactly the next patch tag when it is not yet public, while rejecting non-next or malformed tag mismatches.
Normal public distribution validation remains strict and still verifies the published tag metadata, evidence, installer behavior, and public contract.
Required smoke workflow runs use the narrow release-preparation mode only for release branches or the corresponding main push; the post-publication smoke run uses strict mode.
The release workflow dispatches a strict smoke verification after creating the exact-SHA GitHub Release, and documentation explains the two-phase sequence.
Regression tests, governance checks, and project quality checks pass without changing release metadata or installer behavior.
guidelines: Do not bypass required checks; make the pre-publication state explicit and narrowly scoped.
Keep public tag, release evidence, and installer validation strict after publication.
Keep the release workflow exact-SHA based and do not create or rewrite tags from the PR workflow.

intent.problem: PR #16 cannot merge because smoke requires release.json to match the highest public tag, while v0.5.25 cannot become public until after the PR merges.
constraints: Do not bypass branch protection or merge with a failing required check.
Do not weaken post-publication distribution verification.
Do not change release.json, installer behavior, or product code in this Work Item.
intent.rationale: An explicit two-phase release gate removes the circular dependency while preserving exact-SHA publication and strict public verification.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: the next patch release is accepted as pending only in explicit preparation mode
non-next or malformed release mismatches remain hard failures
published-tag validation remains strict outside preparation mode
release publication dispatches strict post-release smoke verification

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly accepted the recommendation to adjust the release gate workflow instead of bypassing required checks.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
